scenarios.narrative_one_liner: PJM/ERCOT capacity reverts toward cost-of-new-entry floor, ~42% open 2028 book reprices down on EIA-flat demand, 45U nuclear PTC fades at higher power prices, retail normalizes to ~$1.3B; market re-rates VST to a no-growth merchant analog.
scenarios.narrative_long: Capacity auctions clear well below the 2026-27 record print as new gas/storage enters; 2028 open-book repricing lands at the low end (A-Consensus downward variance realized at ~-$0.9B, the P~60% miss compounding). PTC monetization erodes as ERCOT/PJM power prices rise above the phase-out band. Retail EBITDA mean-reverts. Multiple compresses to ~9x — the private-market gas M&A / no-growth-merchant analog — as the AI-power premium deflates.
scenarios.multiple_band_basis: VST 5y avg P/E ~15x; trough merchant analog. Bear 9x = below VST 5y trough and at the private-market gas M&A multiple (Cogentrix 7.25x EV/EBITDA ~ 9-10x P/E equity). Reflects de-rating to no-growth merchant.

eps_bridge.label: 2028 open-book repricing (A-Consensus downward variance, ~-$0.9B EBITDA at low end)
eps_bridge.source_tag: S2: EIA PJM/ERCOT demand + Q1'26 hedge disclosure (58% 2028 hedged)

eps_bridge.label: Capacity auction reversion toward CONE floor
eps_bridge.source_tag: S3: PJM/ERCOT auction sensitivity, R-bear deck

eps_bridge.label: 45U nuclear PTC fade at higher power prices (~$545M ~9% EBITDA)

scenarios.narrative_one_liner: Soft landing for the bear: open-book reprices modestly down, capacity holds above floor but off peak, PPA conversions slip, retail normalizes; VST trades as a leveraged merchant with limited re-rating.
scenarios.narrative_long: The A-Consensus downward variance partially realizes (~-$0.6B, mid of the -0.6/-0.9 range). Capacity stays above CONE but well below the record. Comanche Unit 2 / gas co-location optionality is delayed rather than dead. Multiple settles at ~11x — above the trough analog but below VST's own forward (~13.8x) — pricing in cyclicality and IG-crossover credit (Moody's Ba1).
scenarios.multiple_band_basis: 11x = midpoint between private-market floor (~9-10x P/E equiv) and VST forward (~13.8x). Consistent with leveraged-merchant peers (NRG ~9x EV/EBITDA) before AI premium.

eps_bridge.label: 2028 open-book repricing mid-case (~-$0.6B EBITDA)
eps_bridge.source_tag: S2: EIA demand + Q1'26 hedge book

scenarios.narrative_one_liner: 2027 Adj EBITDA lands ~$7.6B consensus + Cogentrix accretion; hedge book (89% 2027) protects, PPAs ramp, capacity durable above floor; VST holds its forward ~14x P/E.
scenarios.narrative_long: Guidance opportunity ($7.4-7.8B) is met, Cogentrix closes 2H26 and adds mid-single-digit FCF/sh accretion in 2027. AWS+Meta 3,809 MW PPAs ramp on schedule. Open-book risk is real but offset by gas co-location and ERCOT high-demand. Stock holds ~14x — modestly above current forward 13.8x as the cash-return story (FCF yield ~7.2%, highest in peer set) is recognized.
scenarios.multiple_band_basis: VST forward P/E ~13.8x (stockanalysis 6/8/26); 14x base = essentially in line, between 5y avg ~15x and current. Peer CEG ~22x fwd P/E is the re-rate ceiling, not base.

scenarios.narrative_one_liner: PPA conversions land (Comanche Unit 2 + gas co-location), capacity durability proven across two auction cycles, EBITDA tops guidance toward $7.8B+; VST partially closes the gap to CEG on a re-rate to ~16.5x.
scenarios.narrative_long: AI-power demand sustains capacity prices; VST signs incremental data-center PPAs converting open-book MW to contracted premium revenue. Cogentrix accretion runs at the high single-digit end. The market begins to credit VST's nuclear+gas+retail integration with a CEG-adjacent multiple, re-rating to ~16.5x (still a ~5-turn discount to CEG's ~22x fwd P/E).
scenarios.multiple_band_basis: 16.5x = re-rate toward CEG (~22x fwd) but retaining a discount for merchant/leverage. Above VST 5y avg (~15x) and 2025 elevated prints; below CEG/TLN nuclear-pure multiples.

eps_bridge.label: Comanche Unit 2 + gas co-location PPA conversion (open-book -> contracted premium)
eps_bridge.source_tag: S3: VST IR PPA pipeline commentary

scenarios.narrative_one_liner: AI-power supercycle: multiple new hyperscaler PPAs at premium, capacity prices ratchet higher across PJM/ERCOT, full Cogentrix synergy + buyback compounding; VST re-rates to a CEG-adjacent ~18.5x.
scenarios.narrative_long: Structural power-demand shortage drives a multi-year capacity bull market; VST converts a large share of open-book to long-dated contracted PPAs, becomes an investment-grade compounder, and the FCF yield funds an aggressive buyback shrinking the share count. Multiple approaches the low end of the nuclear-pure-play band (~18.5x, still below CEG ~22x).
scenarios.multiple_band_basis: 18.5x approaches CEG-adjacent (~22x fwd P/E) territory; tail re-rate. Above VST's own historical band; predicated on durable contracted-nuclear/gas premium being recognized.

eps_bridge.label: Multiple incremental hyperscaler PPAs at premium
eps_bridge.source_tag: S3: hyperscaler datacenter demand pipeline (AWS/Meta precedent)

eps_bridge.label: Buyback compounding on highest-in-peer FCF yield (~7.2%)
eps_bridge.source_tag: S2: VST capital allocation / FCF yield disclosure

headline.headline_text: VST at $146.90 carries a probability-weighted 12mo expected return of +2.6% (Hold); the distribution is wide and source-conditional on the ~42% 2028 open-book repricing (A-Consensus downward variance, P~60%, magnitude -$0.6 to -$0.9B EBITDA) and on PPA-conversion / capacity-durability optionality — strong_bear $73.80 (-50%) to strong_bull $236.80 (+61%).
